title: Trading Direkt 2026-06-09 | Optionsalternativ med Carl Björkegren, Tobbe med TA
summary_md:
# Trading Direkt 2026-06-09 | Optionsalternativ med Carl Björkegren, Tobbe med TA

**Feed**: trading-direkt  
**Published**: 2026-06-09  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

An episode of Trading Direkt focused on options strategies and market psychology with guest Carl Björkegren, who walked through covered calls, protective calls, and put spreads as tools for navigating a cautious, volatility-driven market dominated by Middle East tensions and oil-price swings. Tobbe Rosin's technical analysis read the major indices (OMXS30, S&P 500, DAX) as still in healthy pullbacks within a positive regime above the 200-day average, expecting upside into mid-July, while flagging VIX and the US 10-year as renewed warning signals. He screened and reviewed individual names with a generally constructive but selective tone — bullish on SKF, Hexatronic, Sinch, Volvo, NCAB and Broadcom, but bearish on Cinclus Pharma, Tobii Dynavox, Vistra and Rottneros.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟢 SKF-B — SKF | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 65%

Positive reversal in value zone, bounce off MR200 support, rising trend channel and pennant formation.

#### Reasoning

Tobbe screened SKF for a cluster of bullish technical signals: a confirmed positive reversal in the value zone, a bounce from the important MR200 support, a rising trend channel and a pennant-like formation whose breakouts most often resolve upward. He calls it 'exciting'.

#### Sell Triggers

- if price breaks back below MR200 support
- if the pennant breaks down instead of up

> *"Och sen har vi då SKF som kom fram för att den har flera stycken signaler... en positiv reversal i värdezonen. Priset studsade dessutom upp från en viktig stödnivå kring MR200."*

---

### 🟢 NCAB — NCAB Group | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 60%

Strong but not parabolic 3-month uptrend, G-force in place, price above short and medium averages.

#### Reasoning

Screened as the medium-term pick on a strong-but-not-overextended 3-month uptrend with a correct slope, G-force in place and price above both short and medium-term moving averages, giving good conditions to perform well over the coming quarter.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the 3-month trend slope rolls over
- if price falls below the short/medium moving averages

> *"Och G-kraften är på plats för uppgång och priset över alla på det korta och medelånga medelvärden... goda förutsättningar för att gå bra även det kommande kvartalet."*

---

### 🟢 HTRO — Hexatronic | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 60%

Up ~200% in half a year; buyers keep returning at higher lows, can be played with limited risk via tight stop.

#### Reasoning

Despite a near-200% half-year rally and pullback risk, buyers keep stepping in at progressively higher lows. Tobbe is positive and notes a position can be taken with limited risk using a tight stop, locking in profit as price moves up from the support.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the latest higher low is punctured
- if the stop level below support is broken (sell pressure trigger)

> *"Men för tillfället så är jag positiv till action... Så jag är positiv till Hexatronic, absolut."*

---

### 🟢 SINCH — Sinch | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 60%

G-forces nearly in place, rising standard line, positive volume balance; continuation patterns near 36.80 seen as buyable.

#### Reasoning

Tobbe is positive: G-forces almost in place for upside, a rising standard line and positive volume balance. He sees good conditions and, even on a deeper pullback toward 36.80, would view continuation patterns there as worth buying, though notes entry this near the top is a weaker edge.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the negative divergence against the top plays out
- if volume balance turns negative

> *"Sen har vi Cinch som jag är positiv till. Ser att G-krafterna är på plats, nästan på plats för uppgång. Standard line stiger... Volymbalansen är positiv."*

---

### 🟢 VOLV-B — Volvo | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 60%

Positive trend with charging/consolidation pattern, averages pointing up, positive volume balance.

#### Reasoning

Volvo shows a positive trend with a charging/consolidation range, moving averages pointing up and positive volume balance. Tobbe would have liked clearer volume on the bounces but his main scenario is a continuation north once consolidation completes.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the consolidation range breaks down instead of up
- if moving averages roll over

> *"Volvo, positiv trend och tycker det ser ut som att det är någon form av uppladdning. Tittar på volymbalansen så är den positiv... Det talar för att den ska vidare norrut."*

---

### 🟢 AVGO — Broadcom | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 60%

Deeply oversold after extreme drop, gap support holding; 24 historical analogs saw higher prices a week later in 19 cases.

#### Reasoning

After the extreme Friday drop that triggered the chip selloff, Broadcom has stabilized and is deeply oversold with two gaps acting as support. Tobbe finds 24 historical cases of such weekly drops, with price higher a week later in 19; a positive continuation pattern off gap support is seen as actionable.

#### Sell Triggers

- if gap support fails
- if no positive continuation pattern forms off the gaps

> *"Så jag är positiv till Broadcom och vi såg också att det här nedgången ger oss en bra edge."*

---

### 🟠 CORE-B — Core & Property | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Neutral | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 40%

Extreme volatility at an all-time low with no physical support; volatility may be fading, possible bottom but unconfirmed.

#### Reasoning

Screened on extreme volatility but sitting at an all-time low with no support below, demanding extra caution. Fading volatility plus a positive candlestick closing above prior day's high could mark a bottom, but a position requires a very tight stop and quick profit-taking.

#### Sell Triggers

- if no positive candlestick closing above prior day's high forms
- if price falls below the stop level

> *"Det finns inget stöd här så jag har kallat den för all time low... Men här är det en chans till en botten. Men vi måste ju först se en positiv kandestriktformation."*

---

### 🟠 MTG-B — MTG | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Neutral | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 45%

Very tightly stretched 2-period RSI under 1 at a first support; potential bounce edge but needs confirmation.

#### Reasoning

MTG shows an extremely stretched 2-period RSI below 1 in low volatility at a first support; in such low-vol setups a continuation pattern at support is the trigger. Historically 24 occurrences gave higher prices half the time, so a confirming candle closing in the upper third is required before acting.

#### Sell Triggers

- if support at 123 is punctured without quick recovery (gap fill)
- if no positive continuation pattern forms

> *"Sen har vi MTG och den har jag då fått fram för att den har en hårt spänd gummisnodd... Den kommer nog att vara en bra edge för uppgång."*

---

### 🔴 TD — Tobii Dynavox | **SELL** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 60%

Fell back under FIB62; far more points to a move down toward the 50 kr level than an upturn.

#### Reasoning

Tobii Dynavox has fallen back under FIB62, which is negative, with considerably more pointing to a slide toward the 50 kr level than a turn up. Only a take-out of the latest short-term top followed by a higher low and strengthening volume balance would flip the view bullish.

#### Sell Triggers

- if price takes out the latest short-term top with a new higher low
- if volume balance turns clearly positive

> *"Dynavox också faller tillbaka ner under fib 62. Det är ju naturligtvis negativt och det är betydligt mer som talar för att aktien ska tillbaka ner mot 50-kronorsnivån."*

---

### ⛔ RROS — Rottneros | **AVOID** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 50%

In a contraction with negative volume balance; bounces lack conviction, leaning toward a downside break.

#### Reasoning

Rottneros sits in a contraction with negative volume balance and bounces that don't show the clear strength Tobbe wants to see toward resistance. For now he is negative and thinks more points to a break down toward the 1.90-1.95 area than the opposite.

#### Sell Triggers

- if volume balance fails to rise clearly toward resistance
- if price breaks down toward 1.90-1.95

> *"Och Rottnerus är jag lite svagt negativ till... mer som talar för att det ska bryta ner kanske mot den här nivån 1,90-1,95 någonstans än motsatsen."*

---

### 🔴 VST — Vistra Group | **SELL** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 60%

Failed to take out the top, fell back under short and long averages, challenging FIB62, risk toward 132.50 USD.

#### Reasoning

Vistra's attempt to take out the top failed and price fell back under both short and long moving averages. It is now challenging FIB62; a puncture markedly raises the risk of a move down toward roughly 132.50 (USD). Tobbe is negative.

#### Sell Triggers

- if FIB62 level is punctured
- price target risk toward 132.50 USD

> *"Så jag är negativ till Vistra Group och det är ju då dollar vi pratar om... Om den nivån punkteras ökar risken påtaglig för att priset ska ner mot 132,50 någonstans."*

---
